name: Stockyard
description: LLM infrastructure suite — cost caps, caching, rate limiting, analytics, and more. Route your Coze bot's LLM calls through Stockyard for complete control.
author: Stockyard

actions.name: get_spend
actions.description: Get current LLM spending — today's cost, monthly cost, and remaining budget.

actions.name: get_cache_stats
actions.description: Get cache hit/miss statistics and estimated cost savings.

actions.name: get_analytics
actions.description: Get usage analytics overview: requests, latency, errors, costs.

actions.name: get_provider_status
actions.description: Check health of all configured LLM providers.

actions.name: test_pii
actions.description: Scan text for PII (emails, phones, SSNs) without sending to LLM.

base_url.label: Stockyard Proxy URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your Stockyard proxy
